# Quick Intro to Machine Learning — Hands-On Course

> Machine index for AI assistants. Each entry: notebook path — title — purpose.
> Generated by scripts/gen_llms_txt.py (do not hand-edit). See AGENTS.md to tutor.

## 00_GettingStarted
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/01_what_is_ml.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/01_what_is_ml.ipynb) — 01 — What is machine learning? — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 1 of 11*

- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/04_generalize_dont_memorize.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/04_generalize_dont_memorize.ipynb) — 04 — Generalize, don't memorize — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 4 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/05_first_classifier_nearest_centroid.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/05_first_classifier_nearest_centroid.ipynb) — 05 — Your first classifier: nearest centroid — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 5 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/06_accuracy_and_baseline.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/06_accuracy_and_baseline.ipynb) — 06 — Is it any good? accuracy and a baseline — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 6 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/07_confusion_matrix_precision_recall.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/07_confusion_matrix_precision_recall.ipynb) — 07 — The confusion matrix, precision & recall — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 7 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/08_scores_thresholds_roc.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/08_scores_thresholds_roc.ipynb) — 08 — Scores, thresholds, ROC & AUC — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 8 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/09_overfitting_generalization_gap.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/09_overfitting_generalization_gap.ipynb) — 09 — Over-/under-fitting and the generalization gap — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 9 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/10_cross_validation.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/10_cross_validation.ipynb) — 10 — Validating honestly: cross-validation — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 10 of 11*
- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/11_preprocessing_leakage.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/11_preprocessing_leakage.ipynb) — 11 — Preprocessing & leakage — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 11 of 11*
## 01_KNN
- [notebooks/01_KNN/01_neighbourhood_vote.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/01_neighbourhood_vote.ipynb) — 01 — Predict by the neighbourhood vote — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 1 of 6*
- [notebooks/01_KNN/02_distance_and_scale.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/02_distance_and_scale.ipynb) — 02 — Distance & the scale trap — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 2 of 6*
- [notebooks/01_KNN/03_the_k_dial.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/03_the_k_dial.ipynb) — 03 — The k dial — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 3 of 6*
- [notebooks/01_KNN/04_estimator_and_parameters.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/04_estimator_and_parameters.ipynb) — 04 — The estimator & its parameters — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 4 of 6*
- [notebooks/01_KNN/05_demanding_case_curse.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/05_demanding_case_curse.ipynb) — 05 — Demanding case: breast cancer & the curse — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 5 of 6*
- [notebooks/01_KNN/06_advanced_distances_and_k.ipynb](notebooks/01_KNN/06_advanced_distances_and_k.ipynb) — 06 — Advanced: distances & choosing k — *Module 01 · k-Nearest Neighbours — notebook 6 of 6 (optional, advanced)*
## 02_NaiveBayes
- [notebooks/02_NaiveBayes/01_bayes_from_counts.ipynb](notebooks/02_NaiveBayes/01_bayes_from_counts.ipynb) — 01 — Bayes' rule, from counts — *Module 02 · Naive Bayes — notebook 1 of 5*

## 03_LogisticRegression
- [notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/01_score_to_probability.ipynb](notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/01_score_to_probability.ipynb) — 01 — From a linear score to a probability — *Notebook 1 of 6 — Logistic Regression*
- [notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/02_boundary_and_weights.ipynb](notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/02_boundary_and_weights.ipynb) — 02 — The decision boundary & reading the weights — *Notebook 2 of 6 — Logistic Regression*
- [notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/03_logloss_objective.ipynb](notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/03_logloss_objective.ipynb) — 03 — Fitting I: what we optimize (log-loss) — *Notebook 3 of 6 — Logistic Regression*
- [notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/04_gradient_descent.ipynb](notebooks/03_LogisticRegression/04_gradient_descent.ipynb) — 04 — Fitting II: gradient descent — *Notebook 4 of 6 — Logistic Regression*
